new_claims.claim_text: Iranian media reports explosions on Kharg Island.
new_claims.notes: Reported by Iranian media, significant escalation if true. Video of smoke included.

new_claims.claim_text: US carried out a large airstrike on Kharg Island on March 13, 2026, hitting 90+ military targets but avoiding oil facilities.
new_claims.notes: Direct refutation of explosion claim, needs verification. From a reply to the Kharg Island explosion post.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump Says 'A whole civilization will die tonight'.
new_claims.notes: Highly charged rhetoric in geopolitical context. Also reported by Fox News.
